enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs shirtless from Boulder on March 27, 2017, recapping a 26-mile outdoor ride after riding 30 miles on rollers the day before. He describes drafting with a group on Highway 36, riding up toward James Canyon, and then breaking off due to having aero bars and listening to music. He also discusses being out of cycling shape, eating difficulties after heavy riding, smoking weed reducing rather than increasing his appetite, and plans for the next day's ride.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: amazing cycle of pain, recovery, sleep, and eating — worth it and nobody should skip it
not allowed to ride with groups when using aero bars due to safety — broke off from the group for that reason
smoking a lot kills his appetite rather than increasing it — has to force himself to eat
normally vegetarian but flexible; focused on eating enough during heavy training
